caption.full:
Paper Tiger starring Adam Driver opens the 64th New York Film Festival

James Gray's crime thriller Paper Tiger, starring Adam Driver, Miles Teller, and Scarlett Johansson, will open the 64th New York Film Festival on September 25. The film will make its North American premiere at the festival's gala event. Distributor Neon is planning a theatrical release for the film on November 13.

What are you most excited to see from Paper Tiger at NYFF this year?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

youtube.title: James Gray's Paper Tiger Opens NY Film Fest Sept 25
youtube.description:
James Gray's crime thriller Paper Tiger will open the 64th New York Film Festival on September 25. The film stars Adam Driver, Miles Teller, and Scarlett Johansson and is set in 1986 Queens and Brooklyn. This marks Gray's fourth film to screen at the festival.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
